items.title: Andreeva wins French Open as Chwalinska fairytale ends
items.dek: Teenager Mirra Andreeva fulfills her huge potential with a first Grand Slam title as Polish qualifier Maja Chwalinska is denied a fairytale French Open victory.
items.body: Teenager Mirra Andreeva fulfills her huge potential with a first Grand Slam title as Polish qualifier Maja Chwalinska is denied a fairytale French Open victory.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ballot initiative could require genital exams for Washington secondary students to play sports
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ward wants to stay with Browns after Garrett deal
items.dek: Browns cornerback Denzel Ward said he wants to remain in Cleveland, even after the team traded defensive end Myles Garrett to the Rams on Monday.
items.body: Browns cornerback Denzel Ward said he wants to remain in Cleveland, even after the team traded defensive end Myles Garrett to the Rams on Monday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
